game.title: Road Trip to Hell
game.short_text: How are you gonna mess the world up?

details.title: Road Trip to Hell
details.description: --------- You and your husband decide to go on a road trip. A very  long road trip, at that. Then the two of you stop off at a gas station because of your random cravings. Shenanigans ensue from there!!! Neither of you two know how much your actions are gonna change the course of so many people's lives... --------- Features: -20+ CGs -Protagonists with questionable morals -Slightly edgy humor -3000+ words to read -Wacky gas station shenanigans! -A short puzzle (still 90% a visual novel) -A single ending --------- Made in 6 days for the Official RPGMaker Jam 2025 and the Road Trip Game Jam!!! (After a shitton of grinding, of course!!!) Link to the RPGMaker Jam:  https://itch.io/jam/rpg-maker-2025-game-jam Link to the Road Trip Jam: https://itch.io/jam/road-trip-game-jam Note: This game ties heavily into my main game, The Cardinal Park Case. While you don't need to play it to make sense of what's going on, a lot of stuff will make sense (and be satisfying!) if you have some context from both games. This game is essentially an over the top prologue for The Cardinal Park Case!!!!! <a href="The" class="redactor-linkify-object">https://liminace.itch.io/the-cardinal-park-case-chapters-1-4">The Cardinal Park Case - Chapters 1-4 by LiminAce</a> Another Note (for the game jam I'm entering!): This game incorporates the theme "Beyond Expectations" because the characters are so horrible that it's beyond the initial expectations!!!

game.title: Down Memory Lane
game.short_text: A rocky road trip between a warm-hearted butch lesbian and a cold-hearted runaway gal.

details.title: Down Memory Lane
details.description:
CONTENT WARNING (CLICK ME) Child neglect
Offscreen, implied child abuse
Drug usage and implied drug abuse
Mentions of offscreen violence
Mentions of past  homophobia and bigotry (not depicted)Emotional manipulation
Verbal abuse
On-screen car crash
Mentions of blood and bodily harm


This game has music! Please redownload if it no audio plays in the menu screen.
STORY:
Charlie, a freelance photographer on a road trip to visit her highschool ex-girlfriend, finds the grumpy runaway schoolgirl, 'Jane Doe', hitchhiking on the a dark road. 
Charlie offers the girl a ride, but little does she know that picking up that particular stray cat signals the start of an adventure she's not ready for...
Down Memory Lane follows our two often-disagreeing leads across 4 chapters with alternating POVs, as they meet various kinds of people.  From a sweet elderly couple to a boy forgotten in a hotel, each meeting impacts them and changes their worldview and opinion of each other, little by little.

Meanwhile, however, Charlie cannot stop thinking about her ex-girlfriend, Lottie, and how wonderful their days together were... 
...Or were they, really?

A story about finding home in unexpected places, moving on from the past, surviving, and most of all - remembering who you are.
          
FEATURES:
Original artwork, including sprites, CGs, and item artChoices that determine how the story will end - will Charlie and Jane's road trip have a good ending, or a bad one...?In-engine animations: the characters run, jump, bounce, move, shake, fall, etc!Cinematic camerawork!38k words of road trippin' goodness!A scrappy camper van named Vonny, who is part of the family!Angst. A whole lot of angst.It accidentally turned into psychological horror halfway through.


YOU SHOULD PLAY THIS IF...
You enjoy stories with characters who are complete opposites, and how they maneuver their interactions and constant disagreements.
You like narratives that slowly build up tension, bitterness, and unresolved issues between its characters.
You've played Hydrangea, also written by me, and enjoyed its deep  delving into psychological abuse, emotional manipulation, and  the impacts of it.


TEAM 'DOWN MEMORY LANE':
Team lead, director, writer: Meiri
Producer:Rafe "Raxef" Altschuler
Art Director & CG Artist: Nevi
Character Designer: alwaysjmb
Sprite Artist & Final CG Artist: Syllphana
CG Artist: Cess
CG Artist: opellac
BG Artist: GlasswingGames
Item Artist: nimbusbird
GUI Artist: Abby Jocson/craboozled
Scripter & Programmer: Breezy
Playtesters:  Circus of Viv, Roxy S., Kristi "HusbandoGoddess" Jimenez
(To press: when talking about this game, please utilize 'Team Down Memory Lane' instead of 'Meiri Games'!)

game.title: Don't Shoot The Messenger
game.short_text: No one else knows the war is over.

details.title: Don't Shoot The Messenger
details.description:
No one else knows the war is over.

You are a young courier who must deliver news of the war's end. Travel with a mismatched group of soldiers where you navigate dangerous terrain, unexpected encounters, and tricky relationships on the long road to peace.
Don't Shoot The Messenger is a fantasy adventure visual novel made for Road Trip Jam 2025! 

Choose your main character's pronouns, name, and look.Make choices to decide the fates of your whole party.See how different items change the outcome of each scene.Listen as the sound dynamically changes to match each scene.
‎ ‎ ‎ ‎ ‎ 

Play day one now!

game.title: Something Left
game.short_text: Left something behind to come to something left.

details.title: Something Left
details.description:
She’s been locked away for over three years. But tonight, everything changes.
Synopsis
After years of isolation caused by a haunting past, a reclusive girl receives an unexpected message—her mother appears in a dream and urges her to seek out the ex-boyfriend she left behind long ago.
 
Driven by curiosity, unresolved feelings, and a flicker of hope, she sets out from her remote home into the vast city, facing unfamiliar streets, fading memories, and the weight of her own emotions.
 
Will she find closure... or uncover something she never expected?

 
Content Warning
This game contains themes of self-harm, suicide, and domestic violence. Viewer and player discretion are advised.
 
Details
15-25 minutes of gameplay  Story-driven / narrative-focused experience  Not suitable for all audiences




 
Credits
BabeElena🌻: Game Director, Game Developer, ScreenwriterOwen6936🌻: Programmer, Thai LocalizerTeacuppo: CG Artist, Character Pixel Artist, Co-Screenwritermrhappyartworks: Environment Pixel Artist

game.title: Liminal Stations
game.short_text: A collaborative weird gas station building game

details.title: Liminal Stations
details.description:
Liminal Stops is a GM-less collaborative weird gas station building game written by me and Quinn Blackwell. You and your friends are on a roadtrip cross country. Except you don't describe the trip - you describe the places you stop. Specifically the gas stations. 
And those gas stations can get WEIRD.
Play with your friends in an weird and uncanny cross country roadtrip that's about you and your relationships to your friends and others in a temporary (or liminal) space.Needed To Play:
3-5 playersThis booklet1d20, 1d12, 1d10, 1d8, 2d6, and 1d4.A slightly, just mildly, unhinged imagination.
Made for The Road Trip Jam 2025 and The Special Interest TTRPG Jam.

game.title: Aether Roads
game.short_text: Steampunk Airship Anime Visual novel, Point and click

details.title: Aether Roads
details.description:
Naptic Studio (@napticstudio.bsky.social) — BlueskyNaptic Studio (@NapticStudio) / X
Steampunk Airship Anime Visual Novel, Point and Click Made for Road Trip Jam 2025
 
Recommend downloading and play on PC. Web version is very buggy.
 
Take command of a struggling airship as you navigate through violent storms, dwindling fuel, and unpredictable passengers. Manage your altitude, engine heat, and balance to survive. Trust no one, every hitchhiker has a story, and not all of them are true.
 
  Play time 10-15 min per game
   Unique 19 characters.
  
Game basic
 
  Click the left and right buttons on the balance panel to stabilize the ship.
   Click the shovel, then click on the firebox door to add more fuel.
   Click the hammer to reduce the boiler's heat.
   Be careful, excess heat can cause the ship to lose balance. Also, bad crew can lead to gameover!
  
Known issues
 
  Sound volume adjustment system.
   Display mode system causes screen resolution to change when switching between windowed mode and fullscreen.
   Game difficulty balance.
   Pause menu screen.
  
To-do list
 
  Character history (to fix player getting the same NPC many times issue).
   Add more sound effects.
   Add option to let crew work or not (sometimes crew working makes the game harder).
   Fix bug on Web version (cloud effects not working).
Credits
Music Artist https://linktr.ee/wingoflittleowl2D Artist https://bsky.app/profile/oshimamagame.bsky.socialProgrammer/3D Artist https://x.com/neronx86
Font x0y0pxFreeFont
Note The game is still a work in progress, so you may encounter some bugs. If you do, feel free to let us know! This is one of our very first games, and we truly appreciate your support.

game.title: STOPOVER - Une Odyssée de Papier
game.short_text: Tarot Journaling Solo TTRPG - Et si tout plaquer n’était pas une fuite, mais le début d’une nouvelle vie ?

details.title: STOPOVER - Une Odyssée de Papier
details.description:
Et si tu laissais tout derrière toi, pour prendre la route, un tarot à la main et des rêves plein la tête ?
Laisse derrière toi les néons fatigués du bureau et prend le volant d’un van-papeterie ambulant. STOPOVER est une aventure solo (ou à deux) qui mêle storytelling intime, hasard poétique et petites victoires du quotidien. Écris des cartes postales, tire les cartes du tarot, et découvre ce qui se cache au détour des routes. Un jeu lent, cozy, pour ceux qui portent l'errance en eux. 🏕️🛻
Leave behind the tired neon lights of the office and take the wheel of a mobile stationery van. STOPOVER is a solo (or two-player) adventure blending intimate storytelling, poetic chance, and the small victories of everyday life. Write postcards, draw tarot cards, and discover what lies around the bend in the road. A slow, cozy game for those who carry wanderlust in their hearts. 🏕️🛻

Un PDF de 15 pages joliment illustré (et une version imprimable de 11 pages pour jouer partout)Une feuille de papier à Origami pour construire ton vanUne grille de Bingo vierge à remplir au fil de ton voyageUne cocotte en papier à plier pour faire une escaleDes tableaux d’interprétation pour jouer tes cartesUne variante deux joueurs pour partager la routeEt surtout : une infinité de récits à inventer 🌟
This illustrated 15-page PDF game (plus an 11-page printable version for playing anywhere) includes an origami sheet to build your own van, a blank bingo grid to fill in as you travel, a paper fortune teller to fold for spontaneous stops, interpretation tables for your cards, a two-player variant to share the journey, and above all—endless stories to create. 🌟

Dans STOPOVER on voyage léger :
Une grille de bingo 5x5 (que tu peux imprimer ou dessiner)Une cocotte en papier (ou un dé à 8 faces)Un jeu de tarot complet sans jokers - à jouer ou divinatoireDes cartes postales, un carnet, ou tout support pour écrire ou dessinerUn stylo et ton imagination ✍️
In STOPOVER, you travel light: all you need is a 5x5 bingo grid (which you can print or draw), a paper fortune teller (or an 8-sided die), a full tarot deck (without jokers—for gameplay or divination), postcards, a notebook, or any medium to write or draw on, plus a pen and your imagination. ✍️
STOPOVER s’adresse à :
Celles et ceux qui aiment les jeux solo narratifs
Les rêveur·ses, les voyageur·ses immobilesLes amoureux·ses de papierToute personne ayant besoin de ralentir et de prendre un moment pour soi
STOPOVER is for the solo storytellers, the dreamers who wander without moving, the paper lovers who treasure every fold and scribble, and anyone who craves a gentle pause—to breathe, to wander, to simply be 📜🌿.




🛣️ Créé dans le cadre de la Road Trip Jam 2025,
STOPOVER est un jeu sous licence Creative Commons BY-NC-ND.

Cela signifie que tu peux partager librement le jeu dans son format original, mais :
Tu ne peux pas le modifier ou en vendre une version dérivéeTu peux créer du contenu additionnel (aventures, journaux de voyage, extensions) si cela reste gratuit et cite clairement le jeu original

game.title: Roadtrip: in Space!
game.short_text: A 3 month contract job and a busted space ship. What could go wrong?

details.title: Roadtrip: in Space!
details.description:
A visual novel made for THE ROADTRIP GAME JAM (2025).
    





FEATURES:
15 thousand lovingly written wordsmusic AND sound effectsAn utterly pathetic protagonistPukegirlA woman who could kill youMommy issuesA little bit of murder. (As a treat.)

Lucy just accepted a 3-month contract position.
All she has to do is keep a spaceship, The Slipstream, from falling apart...
During a 3-month journey into deep space.
What could possibly go wrong?

This 15k word visual novel was made by the following team:
    
Writing and programming by Fisher (hey that's me!)
Music by Avoset
Character Sprites by Cheryl Marill
    
Editing by my lovely boyfriend, Rohze
    



This game features creative commons assets, such as:
Selected works of music by Kyou System
Images from Flickr, edits to create the backgrounds.
Sounds from freesounds.org
To check the licensing or where to find something specific, please check the "about" section on the the game's main menu.Download and extract. Open the folder and click the executable file named "Roadtrip in Space" - and then, enjoy!

game.title: Road to Salvation
game.short_text: How long has it been since you've last been outside? It doesn’t matter, the government needs you now.

details.title: Road to Salvation
details.description:
Click to view content warning
This game contains sensitive material, including but not limited to suicidal thoughts and substance abuse. Player discretion is advised.





You are a vaelix, a dying species that has been hunted to near extinction. Everyday, you live in fear of being eliminated. And yet, only your blood can be used to treat the deadly virus, Flos. Normally, you’d only have to donate your blood but… the blood supplies are running out. Now, the Department of Disease Prevention sends a letter requesting your presence to perform experiments — at the potential cost of your life. That’s fine by you. 
Nonetheless, on your journey, you meet hitchhikers who talk about their life experiences, and that makes you reflect on how much you will miss out. Do you really want to die all for the sake of others?


7k+ words2 main story routes and several alternate branches1 CGFully voice actedOriginal soundtrackTime managementCat

details.title: The Thousand Trees (DAY 1 DEMO)
details.description:
In a future time, a devastating illness turns people into cataclysmic monsters when they hit their breaking point  - the only thing that can stop them, of course, is Magical Girls.
A visual novel made for NANORENO and Road TripJam 2025. The first day (out of four total) is playable in this (rough) demo.
The final game will have:
- approx. 30k+ words
- 2 endings (plus character-specific ending scenes)
- magical girls
- various Road Trip Shenanigans
very mild warnings for references to death/corpses, mild political themes, some brushed upon callousness towards mental health, eye-searing imagery.
